prompt: Create a dark gothic fashion magazine editorial poster in a vertical 2:3 format. The scene is a dim, luxurious bathroom with dark gray marble walls, a black stone vanity, a white rectangular sink, a chrome faucet, and a large mirror reflecting the model’s back and black feather wing. Feature one adult Asian female model, unnamed model, with cool sweet facial features, long slightly messy dark brown wavy hair, pale skin, and a restrained mysterious smile. She is sitting sideways on the black vanity beside the sink: one hand rests on the sink edge, one knee bent up on the counter, the other leg extended downward toward the floor, creating an elegant fashion pose. Outfit: fitted black short-sleeve crop top, high-waisted black mini shorts or micro skirt, semi-transparent smoky black patterned tights with diagonal stripe details, black thin-strap high-heeled sandals with metallic gold accents, a delicate silver necklace with a tiny pendant, and a black wristwatch. Add one visible black feather angel wing behind her on the left side, partly reflected in the mirror. She holds one silver mirrored mosaic masquerade mask beside her face with her raised right hand; the mask should be shiny, tiled, and reflective with cutout eyes. Lighting is low-key cinematic, moody charcoal and black palette, soft directional light from the front-left, subtle reflections, glossy marble texture, quiet lonely atmosphere, high-fashion editorial photography, realistic skin and fabric textures, slight film grain, no nudity, no extra people. Add magazine-style typography integrated into the image: large distressed serif headline at upper left reading ECHO CHAMBER; small subtitle beneath reading — SOME SILENCES STAY WITH YOU.; small plus signs and left-column text reading “REFLECTIONS / DON’T LIE, / THEY JUST / REMEMBER.”; small issue block reading “009 / ALONE, BUT / NOT EMPTY.”; bottom-left quote reading IN THE DARK, I FIND MY TRUTH. with a tiny audio waveform line below; bottom-right footer reading VOL.09 / ECHOES WITHIN. Keep all text white or pale gray, elegant, spaced, slightly distressed, aligned like a modern gothic magazine cover.
